title: SEPOX® 44MM Weatherproof Outdoor Padlock Keyed Alike, Heavy Duty Steel Lock Body with Blue Cover Waterproof, Long Shank 2pcs Locks with 4 Keys Same, Ideal for Garden, Garage, Gate, Fence, Marine
features: 🔒 REINFORCED SECURITY Featuring a laminated design for exceptional strength and unwavering security. A powerful protector safeguarding your assets from unauthorized access. Ideal for use in gardens, garages, gates, fences, and marinas.

🛡️ FULL PROTECTION WITHOUT COMPROMISE Encased in a complete PVC cover, this lock offers comprehensive protection against the elements. Ensuring the long-lasting performance of both the shackle and lock body. Perfect for outdoor use.
🔑CYLINDER LOCK MECHANISM Simplifies access with an easy-to-operate cylinder mechanism that provides smooth opening and closing. Great for various applications.
🔄 KEY ALIKE SYSTEM A convenient system that offers five identical locks and two keys for each lock. No more multiple keys, no more hassle. Suitable for different scenarios.

🎯WIDE RANGE OF APPLICATIONS The SEPOX padlock is not just for gates and sheds. Its versatility extends to securing lockers, storage units, boats, fences, and more. A true all-rounder for the Euro market.
description: Product Description water proof anti-rust full cover body with brass cylinder Our SEPOX padlock set includes 2 pcs lock each with 2 identical keys, all of which are key-alike, eliminating the need for multiple keys. The key features a comfortable, easy-to-hold handle for effortless unlocking. With 30-years reputation for producing locks for world-famous brands, SEPOX ensures unmatched quality and reliability. It is also resistant to corrosion, ensuring its longevity.any other outdoor application, this padlock offers reliable security with its robust construction and options for key or combination access. Enhanced Security: With its high-security features, this padlock is ideal for outdoor use. Whether you need a lock for your wooden fence gate (fence lock), storage unit (lock for storage unit), Introducing the SEPOX Brand Premium Waterproof Padlock the ultimate combination of durability, security, and convenience! Crafted with excellence, this padlock is designed for various applications, from securing outdoor fences and gates to tools boxes. It boasts a solid steel lock body, a brass cylinder, and a hardened steel long shackle, all covered by waterproof blue PVC material. Waterproof and Corrosion-Resistant: The padlock's full coverage of blue PVC material enhances its waterproof capabilities, making it ideal for outdoor use, including marine and boat environments. Solid Construction: The SEPOX padlock's solid steel lock body, brass cylinder, and hardened steel shackle provide exceptional strength and durability, ensuring maximum security for your belongings. All key-alike, enabling you to open any of the locks with just one key. The key's comfortable handle adds to its user-friendly design, providing a smooth unlocking experience. Wide range of applications, including key padlocks, gate locks,storage locks for units, and even bicycle locks (candado para bicicletas). It provides secure locking solutions for various needs. Here is the detail size information: Shackle： Height：2” Diameter: 0.3" Width: 0.7” Lock Body： Width：1.7" Total Height：3.5“ Thickness：1“
